TextView.android:text:
1. How It Works
Instead of first-come-first-served, this app uses a lottery system. You join the waiting list for an event during its registration period, and when registration closes, participants are randomly selected from the waiting list.

2. Joining the Waiting List
You can join a waiting list by browsing events, scanning a QR code, or accepting an invitation from an organizer. Some events may require your location or have a limited number of waiting list spots. You can leave the waiting list at any time before the draw.

3. Random Selection
Once registration closes, the organizer draws a set number of participants at random from the waiting list. Every entrant on the waiting list has an equal chance of being selected.

4. After the Draw
If you are selected, you will receive a notification and can accept or decline the invitation. If you are not selected, you will also be notified. If a selected participant declines, a new entrant is automatically drawn from the remaining waiting list.

5. Notifications
You will be notified when you win or lose the draw, or when you are promoted from the waiting list. You can opt out of notifications in your profile settings.
